name: joshuaswanson
lineage: PR #1873 (@schattenjuwel / Liva, originally nothingLiva PR1707) — SP10240 Casefold + TTT + GPTQ + Byte-PPM-D Mixture (val_bpb 0.82006). The neural network, training pipeline, GPTQ quantization, TTT phase, and PPM-D order-5 byte mixer code are byte-identical to that submission. This submission's contribution is exclusively the gate-hyperparameter discovery via offline sweep.
key_innovation: Offline sweep of PPM-D byte-mixer gate hyperparameters (T, H, L) on a dumped (tga, lpa) from PR #1873's actual NN distribution. Found T=0.7, H=0.99, L=0.3 dominates PR #1873's hand-picked T=0.9, H=0.9, L=0.05 by ~20 mBPB on the 3-seed mean. Code is byte-identical to PR #1873; only env-var hyperparameters changed at run time.

hyperparameters_changed.PPM_C: 0.9 -> 0.7 (lower confidence threshold for switching to PPM)
hyperparameters_changed.PPM_LHI: 0.9 -> 0.99 (higher NN weight at low PPM confidence)
